# @andes/visually-hidden

<br />

Used to hide content visually but keep it accessible to screen readers.

<br />

## How to use

<br />

### Installation

> Follow the [general installation guide](../../docs/installation.md).

```bash

npm install --save @andes/visually-hidden

```

### Styles

> Follow the [general styles usage guide](../../docs/styles-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your bundle:

```css

@import '@andes/visually-hidden/index';

```

### Scripts

> Follow the [general scripts usage guide](../../docs/scripts-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your page:

```jsx

import { VisuallyHidden, VisuallyHiddenFocusable } from '@andes/visually-hidden';

```

## Public API

### VisuallyHidden

| Property | Description | Type | Default | Required |
| -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------- | -------- |
| `children` | Custom content. | `node` |  |  |
| `component` | Html tag used for the element wrapper. | `string: 'div', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'span'` |  `span` |  |

### VisuallyHiddenFocusable

| Property | Description | Type | Default | Required |
| -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------- | -------- |
| `children` | Custom content. | `node` |  |  |
| `className` | Custom class. | `string` | `undefined` |  |
| `component` | Html tag used for the element wrapper. | `string: 'input', 'textarea', 'button', 'select', 'option', 'a', 'details', 'summary'` |  `button` |  |

## Examples

For full demo and configuration options, check out the [story for Visually Hidden](https://andes.adminml.com/web/?selectedKind=VisuallyHidden).

### VisuallyHidden

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { VisuallyHidden } from '@andes/visually-hidden';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <VisuallyHidden>
    Hidden Content
  </VisuallyHidden>,
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/visually-hidden/index';
```

### VisuallyHiddenFocusable

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { VisuallyHiddenFocusable } from '@andes/visually-hidden';
import './styles.scss';

const MyComponent = () => (
  <VisuallyHiddenFocusable>
    Hidden Content and focusable
  </VisuallyHiddenFocusable>,
);

export default MyComponent;
```

```css
/* styles.scss */
@import '@andes/visually-hidden/index';
```
